name: Slab
description: Drive Slab (team wiki) from any AI agent via its GraphQL API: posts, topics, users, search. 6 tools, Bearer auth.
instructions:
This connector uses the Slab GraphQL API (api.slab.com/v1/graphql).

**Setup**:
1. Sign in to Slab → top-right avatar → **Account Settings → Tokens → Create token**.
2. Pick scopes: at minimum `read posts`, `read topics`, `read users`.
3. Set `SLAB_API_TOKEN`.

**Authentication**: `Authorization: Bearer ${SLAB_API_TOKEN}`.

**GraphQL-only**: Slab has no REST. The adapter exposes a few curated mutations + queries as wrappers; for arbitrary queries use the auto-injected GraphQL builtins (each GRAPHQL adapter gets `slab_graphql_schema`, `slab_graphql_query`, `slab_graphql_mutation` automatically).

**Post format**: Slab posts use a JSON content tree (Slate.js-like). Reading is straightforward; writing requires composing the AST OR using the markdown-import endpoint.

**Topics = folders**: posts live in topics (hierarchical).

**Out of scope here**: post-content editing via AST (use markdown import), integrations, billing.

tools.name: slab_me
tools.description: Return the user the token belongs to (id, name, email, organization). Use the auto-injected slab_graphql_query for more complex selections.

endpointMapping.path: { me { id name email organization { id name } } }

tools.name: slab_get_post
tools.description: Fetch a post by ID with title + content (in markdown) + topics + owner.

endpointMapping.path: query GetPost($id: ID!) { post(id: $id) { id title content(format: MARKDOWN) updatedAt owner { name } topics { id name } } }
query SearchPosts($q: String!, $first: Int) { search(query: $q, first: $first) { edges { node { ... on Post { id title updatedAt owner { name } } } } } }

tools.name: slab_list_topics
tools.description: List top-level topics in the organization.

endpointMapping.path: query ListTopics($first: Int) { topics(first: $first) { edges { node { id name description parent { id name } } } } }
query TopicPosts($id: ID!, $first: Int) { topic(id: $id) { id name posts(first: $first) { edges { node { id title updatedAt } } } } }

tools.name: slab_create_post
tools.description: Create a post from markdown content.

topicIds.description: Topic IDs to place the post in.

endpointMapping.path: mutation CreatePost($title: String!, $content: String!, $topics: [ID!]) { postCreate(title: $title, content: $content, format: MARKDOWN, topicIds: $topics) { id title } }
